thread.title: Trump Nominates Lori Chavez-DeRemer To Lead US Labour Department
thread.title_full: Trump Nominates Lori Chavez-DeRemer To Lead US Labour Department

author: News18
title: Trump Nominates Lori Chavez-DeRemer To Lead US Labour Department
text:
Trump Nominates Lori Chavez-DeRemer To Lead US Labour Department
Lori Chavez-DeRemer, the Oregon House member who narrowly lost her reelection bid earlier this month, received strong backing from union members in her district.
US President-elect Donald Trump has chosen Republican US Rep. Lori Chavez-DeRemer as his nominee to lead the Labour Department. The Oregon House member who narrowly lost her reelection bid earlier this month received strong backing from union members in her district.
As a potential labor secretary, Chavez-DeRemer would oversee the Labour Department’s workforce and its budget and put forth priorities that impact workers’ wages, health, safety and ability to unionise, and employers’ rights to fire employees, among other responsibilities.
ALSO READ: Trump Picks Pam Bondi As Attorney General Hours After Matt Gaetz Withdraws
“Lori’s strong support from both the Business and Labour communities will ensure that the Labour Department can unite Americans of all backgrounds behind our Agenda for unprecedented National Success – Making America Richer, Wealthier, Stronger and more Prosperous than ever before!" Trump said in a statement.
PTI)
